pepper bell bacterial spot.symptoms: Small dark lesions with possible yellow halos and progressive leaf damage.
pepper bell bacterial spot.cause: Bacterial infection spread by water splash, contaminated tools, or infected seedlings.
action: Use a copper-based bactericide if locally recommended.

pepper bell healthy.symptoms: No strong visible disease pattern detected.

potato early blight.symptoms: Brown lesions with concentric rings, often on older leaves.
potato early blight.cause: Alternaria fungal infection, favored by warm and humid conditions.

potato late blight.symptoms: Rapid dark lesions and possible mold growth under humid conditions.
potato late blight.cause: Highly aggressive blight organism in cool and wet weather.

tomato bacterial spot.symptoms: Dark leaf lesions causing spotting, yellowing, and defoliation.
tomato bacterial spot.cause: Bacterial spread via water, handling, and contaminated tools.

tomato early blight.symptoms: Target-like lesions with brown rings on older leaves.
tomato early blight.cause: Alternaria fungal disease, common in warm humid conditions.

tomato late blight.symptoms: Fast-spreading dark lesions, stem damage, and fruit rot risk.
tomato late blight.cause: Severe blight organism spreading quickly in cool/wet environments.
action: Act fast and isolate affected plants.

tomato leaf mold.symptoms: Yellow upper-leaf patches and olive-brown mold underneath.
tomato leaf mold.cause: Fungal growth promoted by humidity and poor ventilation.

tomato septoria leaf spot.symptoms: Small circular spots with dark borders and pale centers.
tomato septoria leaf spot.cause: Fungal spread via splash and infected debris.

tomato target spot.symptoms: Brown ringed lesions that may enlarge and merge.
tomato target spot.cause: Fungal disease favored by warm and humid conditions.

tomato tomato mosaic virus.symptoms: Mottled or mosaic leaf pattern, distortion, and stunted growth.
tomato tomato mosaic virus.cause: Viral infection spread through handling, tools, and infected plant material.
action: Do not save seed from infected plants.
